title: Label 309 signature entry
description: A single optional record-level authorship signature: a CLOSED CBOR map `{cose_sign1, ? cose_key}`. `cose_sign1` (REQUIRED) carries the CBOR-encoded COSE_Sign1 produced by the signer as a single byte string. `cose_key` (optional) carries the CBOR-encoded COSE_Key for the CIP-30 wallet path as a single byte string; it is omitted for the in-signature `kid` (identity-key) path. The field names describe what the bytes are on the wire. STRUCTURAL only: COSE_Sign1 structural decode (MALFORMED_SIG_COSE_SIGN1), the path-1/path-2 mutual exclusion (SIG_ENTRY_KID_COSE_KEY_CONFLICT), the SIG_PRIVATE_KEY_LEAKED guard, and signature cryptographic verification are domain-pass / verifier concerns. The map is closed: unknown keys are rejected. (Canonical CBOR map-key ordering places `cose_key` before `cose_sign1`; JSON property order is irrelevant.)
